item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju dengan pendirian mereka bahwa keseimbangan antara hak individu dan kepentingan masyarakat penting.

notes: Agent A starts as a clear supporter of society-first priority, then moves toward a balance frame and warns that excessive prioritization of society can ignore basic rights. Agent B starts from a U.S. individual-rights position, then also moves toward balance while keeping the warning that public interest can over-limit personal freedom. Both agents engage the other's specific rights-vs-collective framing; Agent A's first turn has all-caps style, but the position is still clear.
